nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I always like to draft myself and get feedback from the AI, rather than having the AI draft for me

nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: I'm often looking for the AI partner to nudge me to more divergent thinking, and away from the obvious suggestions

nodes.label: AI adherence to user style preferences
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from user style rules
nodes.grounding_span: I reminded it about our rule, and asked it to redo the piece without them

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have lots of prompts like that that work on a single, clearly-defined task

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: I'm trying to shift them towards using AI judiciously in the process, but that's a struggle

nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: It's completely changed the value I get from courses and webinars

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing, so I always like to draft myself

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I have lots of prompts like that that work on a single, clearly-defined task

nodes.label: Continuous learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep iterating on my processes, to keep challenging myself to find ways to use AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: I really value the suggestions, and find it helps make my writing tighter

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's failure to follow rules
nodes.grounding_span: Yesterday was very frustrating. I was using ChatGPT 5 to work on some shortform client content, and it was full of em-dashes

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: When I realised it actually worked, and how helpful it was, that was a big moment

nodes.label: Concern about AI becoming competitor
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not worried about AI taking my job, but I am aware that people using AI could take my job

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: I'll proceed like that, back and forth, with the AI offering suggestions, which sparks ideas from me

nodes.label: Proactive anticipation and steering of AI defaults
nodes.grounding_span: I'll give a list at the start of the conversation and say, 'Don't use any of these examples'
